forecast-period.text: For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.

A high-pressure system south of the state will move east on Wednesday allowing a strong cold front to move over South Australia later Thursday. A cooler southwest to southerly flow will gradually moderate as a stronger high-pressure system moves in from the west from Friday to be south of the state on Sunday.
* Calls to 1300 number cost around 27.5c inc. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones. Marine forecasts are also available on VHF and HF radio. View the radio schedule on www.bom.gov.au/marine
Check the latest Coastal Waters Forecast or Local Waters Forecast at http://www.bom.gov.au/sa/forecasts/map.shtml for information on wind, wave and weather conditions for these coastal zones.
Wind and wave forecasts are averages. Wind gusts can be 40 per cent stronger than the forecast, and stronger still in squalls and thunderstorms. Maximum waves can be twice the forecast height.
Southwesterly 10 to 15 knots shifting east to southeasterly below 10 knots in the evening.
Below 1 metre.
West to southwesterly below 0.5 metres.
Mostly clear.
Easterly about 10 knots becoming north to northeasterly in the early morning.
Below 1 metre.
West to southwesterly below 0.5 metres.
Cloudy. 95% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon.
Northerly 10 to 15 knots tending northwesterly 15 to 20 knots before dawn then tending westerly in the evening.
Around 1 metre, increasing to 1 to 1.5 metres by early evening.
West to southwesterly below 1 metre.
Partly cloudy. 90% chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning.
Westerly 20 to 25 knots turning southwesterly during the afternoon.
1.5 to 2 metres.
West to southwesterly below 1 metre.
Cloudy. 80% chance of showers.
Southwesterly 15 to 20 knots turning southerly 10 to 15 knots during the evening.
1.5 to 2 metres, decreasing to 1 to 1.5 metres during the afternoon.
West to southwesterly below 1 metre.
Cloudy. 50% chance of showers.
